name: feature-audit
description: One-command evening feature auditor. Fans out to every relevant review skill in parallel (feature-review, security-audit, contract-drift-check, complexity-check, test-coverage-delta, migration-safety, api-mock-parity, perf-budget, dead-code-scan, null-safety-scan, system-design, dependency-hygiene) and synthesizes ONE report with ONE merge verdict.
